basic_details.job_title: AMC Sahayak Fireman Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 172 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Fireman (Direct Recruitment) – Only Male Candidates
basic_details.short_information: Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation has released the official Assistant Fireman Notification 2026 on 30 April 2026 at the official website https://ahmedabadcity.gov.in. A total of 172 vacancies have been announced under the AMC Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 32 years (age relaxation applicable) with a qualification of SSC (10th Pass) can apply online from 30 April 2026 to 14 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

important_dates.physical fitness test / further process: To be notified on AMC website

application_fee.sc_fee: Rs. 250/- (Rupees Two Hundred and Fifty only)
application_fee.details: Candidates applying for the post of Assistant Fireman are required to pay a non-refundable application fee as specified below. The fee must be paid online through the AMC application portal. Fee paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. | Candidates submitting applications without the prescribed fee will have their candidature rejected. Candidates are therefore advised to confirm their eligibility and verify all details before making payment. | Fee payment deadline: 18-05-2026 (online only – Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking)

age_limit.details: Candidates must be at least 18 years and not more than 32 years of age as on the closing date of application (14-05-2026). Relaxation in upper age limit is provided for reserved categories as per rules. Maximum age limit including all relaxations shall not exceed 45 years under any circumstances, except for candidates already in AMC service. | AMC Auxiliary Task Force volunteers on honorarium basis get age relaxation equal to years of satisfactory service (Chief Fire Officer certificate required).

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (14-05-2026). Only male candidates are eligible. Reserved category benefits are available only to original residents of Gujarat holding valid caste/category certificates issued by competent authority of Gujarat Government. | The minimum educational qualification required is SSC (Class 10) pass. Higher qualifications carry additional marks in the merit system. Knowledge of Gujarati is relevant to the post. | Educational Qualification & Marks Weightage | Note: Marks under qualification items (1), (2), (3) are base marks. Fire-related course marks (item 4) are added over and above the base marks.

vacancy_details.Disability Type: Locomotor disability incl. Acid Attack Victims (AAV) – without cerebral palsy
Autism (ASD-M), Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness; Multiple Disabilities (B & C)

salary_details.pay_scale: Fixed Pay ₹26,000/- for 3 years; thereafter Level-2, Pay Matrix ₹19,900–63,200/- Basic + other allowances as per rules

selection_process: Sl. No. Test Minimum Qualifying Standard (10 Marks)
1 Long Jump 3.80 metres
2 High Jump 1.0 metre
3 800m Run 200 seconds (general); 230 seconds for AMC Auxiliary Task Force volunteers
4 200m Swimming 300 seconds
Event 10 marks 20 marks 30 marks 40 marks 50 marks 60 marks 70 marks 80 marks 90 marks 100 marks
800m Run (General) Below 200 sec Below 190 sec Below 185 sec Below 180 sec Below 175 sec Below 170 sec Below 165 sec Below 160 sec Below 155 sec Below 150 sec
200m Swimming Below 300 sec Below 285 sec Below 270 sec Below 255 sec Below 240 sec Below 225 sec Below 210 sec Below 195 sec Below 180 sec Below 165 sec
Condition Requirement
Minimum per event 10 marks (must pass each event individually)
Minimum aggregate (all 4 events combined) 40% i.e. minimum 160 marks out of 400

The selection process for AMC Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026 consists of 2 successive stages — Physical Standards Check followed by Physical Fitness Test (PFT) — after which a merit list is prepared combining PFT marks and Educational Qualification marks.

Candidates who pass the physical standards check will be called for the Physical Fitness Test. Only candidates who pass all four events of the PFT (minimum 10 marks in each event AND minimum 40% aggregate
i.e.

160 marks out of 400) will have their PFT marks combined with educational qualification marks for the merit list. The combined merit list will be submitted to the Staff Selection Committee for further process.
Stage 1 – Physical Standards Verification
Height
Weight
and Chest measurement as per standards in (D) above.
Stage 2 – Physical Fitness Test (PFT)
Performance Scoring Table (10 to 100 Marks per Event)
Qualifying Marks

physical_eligibility.details: Candidates must meet the following minimum physical standards to be eligible. Candidates failing any physical standard will be disqualified. | Physical Disqualifications | Candidates will be disqualified if they have any of the following: visual defect (vision must be 6/6), color blindness, squint eye, flat feet, knock-knees, pigeon chest, hunchback, abnormal physical behavior, deafness, or any physical deformity hampering duties as a Fireman.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the AMC Recruitment portal accessible at https://ahmedabadcity.gov.in. No offline/hard copy applications will be accepted. Candidates must visit the Recruitment & Results section and click Apply Online against the relevant vacancy.

After submitting the application form, a payment link will open automatically. Candidates must complete fee payment via Debit Card, Credit Card, or Net Banking. An application number will be generated after successful submission and sent to the registered mobile number via SMS.
Candidates are not required to submit original documents at the time of online application; documents will be called for physical verification at a later stage as required by AMC.
Documents to be Submitted at Document Verification Stage (when called):
Age proof (Birth Certificate / SSC marksheet)
Educational qualification marksheets and certificates (SSC onwards)
Category/Caste certificate (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS) issued by competent Gujarat Government authority
Non-Creamy Layer certificate (for SEBC candidates) – valid period: issued between 01/04/2024 and 14/05/2026
PwBD (Divyang) certificate from Civil Surgeon (if applicable) – minimum 40% disability
NCC certificate / Fire course certificates / Computer course certificate (if applicable)
AMC Auxiliary Task Force service certificate from Chief Fire Officer (if applicable)
Passport size photograph (same as uploaded in online form)
Online application form receipt
Marriage registration certificate (for female candidates applying in husband's name)
Apply Online at: https://ahmedabadcity.gov.in
Only male candidates are eligible to apply for this post.
Eligibility, age, qualification, and experience will be calculated as on the last date of application i.e. 14-05-2026.
No hard copy applications will be accepted – online submission only.
Application fee is non-refundable; applications without fee (except PwBD) will be rejected.
Only one application per cadre is permitted; if multiple applications are submitted, only the last confirmed online application will be valid and excess fee paid will not be refunded.
If marksheet/degree shows Grade or CGPA instead of percentage, the candidate must submit the University's official conversion chart at the time of document verification.
Reserved category benefits are available only to original residents of Gujarat; certificates issued by other State Governments will not be accepted.
SEBC candidates must submit valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate (issued between 01/04/2024 to 14/05/2026) in the prescribed format (Parishisht-4).
EWS candidates must submit valid EWS certificate (valid for 3 years from date of issue, issued before last date of application) in prescribed format (Parishisht-Ga / Annexure-KH).
PwBD candidates must submit permanent disability certificate from Civil Surgeon showing minimum 40% disability.
Candidates must mention a valid mobile number with DND settings OFF in the application form; AMC will not be responsible for non-delivery of messages.
No written correspondence will be made with candidates regarding the recruitment process; candidates are advised to regularly check www.ahmedabadcity.gov.in for updates.
Candidates must attend the written examination/interview at their own expense.
Any pressure exerted directly or indirectly on the Staff Selection Committee members will result in disqualification of the candidate.
AMC reserves the right to cancel or modify this advertisement at any time without assigning reasons.
All decisions of the Staff Selection Committee / Municipal Commissioner regarding eligibility, selection, and other matters are final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AMC Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026 is 14 May 2026 up to 23:59 hours.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released under AMC Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Amdavad Municipal Corporation has notified a total of 172 Assistant Fireman vacancies under Advertisement No. 01/2026‑27, including 24 posts reserved for PwBD candidates within the overall category‑wise distribution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification for AMC Assistant Fireman 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is SSC (Class 10) pass from a recognized board, and the percentage of marks obtained in SSC is converted into base merit marks up to a maximum of 100.

faq.question: Q4. Are female candidates eligible for Ahmedabd Municipal Corporation Assistant Fireman recruitment?
faq.answer: No, only male candidates are eligible to apply for the Assistant Fireman posts under this advertisement, as clearly specified in the AMC notification and service conditions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AMC Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 32 years of age as on 14 May 2026, with upper age relaxations for SC, ST, SEBC, EWS, women, PwBD and AMC Auxiliary Task Force volunteers as per AMC rules, subject to overall maximum limits.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AMC Assistant Fireman posts?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of a physical standards test followed by a four‑event Physical Fitness Test, and only candidates who qualify in all events and secure at least 160 out of 400 PFT marks will be considered for final merit by combining PFT scores with educational qualification merit.

faq.question: Q7. What are the physical standards required for AMC Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must have a minimum height of 165 cm, weight of at least 50 kg, chest 76 cm unexpanded and 81 cm expanded with at least 5 cm expansion, and they must be free from disqualifying conditions like weak eyesight, colour blindness, flat feet, knock knees or other deformities.

faq.question: Q8. How much is the application fee for AMC Assistant Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General category candidates must pay ₹500, SC, ST, SEBC and EWS candidates must pay ₹250, while PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee; payment must be made online by 18 May 2026 through the AMC portal.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Gujarat claim reservation benefits in AMC Fireman recruitment?
faq.answer: No, reserved category benefits such as SC, ST, SEBC, EWS and PwBD reservations are available only to original residents of Gujarat who possess valid certificates issued by competent authorities of the Gujarat Government in the prescribed formats.

faq.question: Q10. How are educational qualifications counted in AMC Assistant Fireman merit list?
faq.answer: SSC percentage is taken as base marks up to 100, and additional fixed marks are given for higher qualifications and fire‑related courses like HSC, engineering degrees, ITI Fireman, Diploma or Degree in Fire, NCC certificates, computer course and AMC Auxiliary Task Force service, which are added to the PFT score to prepare the final merit list.
